---
title: "Interactive Learning Apps"
page-layout: full
listing:
  - id: apps-list
    contents: apps.yml
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 4
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: true
    categories: true
    image-lazy-loading: true
    field-required:
      - title
      - description
      - image
---

:::{.catalog-hero}
:::{.catalog-kicker}
Small tools, big ideas
:::

Visual Shiny experiments for statistics, machine learning, probability, and mathematical thinking.
:::

:::{#apps-list}
:::
